questionHtml: Suggest one reason that the relative brain mass of Homo is different from Parapithecus and Australopithecus.
markschemeHtml:
a. human cerebral cortex has extensive folding producing a greater mass ✔

b. better diet/more protein allowed increase in «relative» brain mass in humans ✔

c. others had larger body to protect them from predators «without increase in brain mass» ✔

meta.title: Suggest one reason that the relative brain mass of Homo is different from Parapithecus and Australopithecus.
breadcrumbLabels: C3.1.4. The brain as a central information integration organ
